name: Savory Fruit Compote
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Balsamic vinegar (or more, to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dried fruit and orange slices in a pot with enough water to cover them.
2. Simmer for 30 minutes or until the fruit is soft.
3. Add the winter savory sprigs and balsamic vinegar.
4. Remove from heat and let cool to room temperature.
5. Serve immediately or refrigerate; if refrigerated, allow it to come to room temperature before serving.
This compote serves as a sweet/tart accompaniment to mild main dishes or can be enjoyed as a not-too-sweet dessert with slices of pound cake.
